info.title: Force24 API
info.description: Force24 Marketing Automation API - provides endpoints for managing contacts, email campaigns, SMS campaigns, marketing lists, web activity tracking, and subscription preferences.

get.summary: Returns a list of client contacts that were recently created or updated satisfying the specified filters

parameters.name: marketingListId
parameters.description: Specify this filter to return only the contacts who are in the specified marketing list

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description:
Comma separated field names.
Use * to return all available fields.

get.description: Returns a list of client contacts that were recently created or updated satisfying the specified filters

get.summary: Returns a batch of client email campaigns satisfying the specified filters

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: number of items to offset

parameters.name: take
parameters.description: number of items to return. TODO: specify the max value

parameters.name: sortByField
parameters.description: sort field name

parameters.name: descending
parameters.description: sort by direction. default is ascending (false). set to true for descending

get.description: Returns a batch of client email campaigns satisfying the specified filters

get.summary: Returns a batch of client marketing lists satisfying the specified filters
get.description: Keyword parameter must be contained by the returned lists. Comparisons are case-insensitive.

parameters.name: keyword
parameters.description: case-insensitive, 'contains' filtering

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: list of tag ids

parameters.name: includeTestLists
parameters.description: test lists are excluded by default. set to true should test lists be returned

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: number of items to offset

parameters.name: take
parameters.description: number of items to return. TODO: specify the max value

parameters.name: sortByField
parameters.description: sort field name

parameters.name: descending
parameters.description: sort by direction. default is ascending (false). set to true for descending

sourceKey.description: Optional parameter used to identify ExternalId sources.Should be used when multiple sources are used to push data to Force24 and ExternalId links are important

fields.description: Optional parameter used to return contact fields after successful Upsert. These fields can be any supported field including fields that have not been part of the uspert request.
Contact fields as an object of key:value pairs

sourceKey.description: Optional parameter used to identify ExternalId sources.Should be used when multiple sources are used to push data to Force24 and ExternalId links are important

fields.description: Optional parameter used to return contact fields after successful contact creation. These fields can be any supported field including fields that have not been part of the create request.
Contact fields as an object of key:value pairs

sourceKey.description: Optional parameter used to identify ExternalId sources.Should be used when multiple sources are used to push data to Force24 and ExternalId links are important

fields.description: Optional parameter used to return contact fields after successful Update. These fields can be any supported field including fields that have not been part of the update request.
Contact fields as an object of key:value pairs

totalCount.description: total number of items matching the filter conditions

moreItemsAvailable.description: flag indicating if there are more items available or not besides the ones already requested

lockStatus.description:
Mark the marketing list as read only or as readWrite
<para>Default value is 'readWrite'</para>
